reviews.comment:
Soy de buenos aires ,lomas de zamora pero viajo frecuentemente a sgo del estero y esta estacion de servicios es mi segunda casa alli desayuno ymeriendo como voy al campo es mi primer lugar de parada cuando llego y el ultimo cuando vuelvo personal y servicios exelentes

(Translated by Google)
I'm from Buenos Aires, Lomas de Zamora, but I travel frequently to Santiago del Estero, and this service station is like a second home to me. I have breakfast and afternoon tea there. Since I'm going to the countryside, it's my first stop when I arrive and my last when I leave. Excellent staff and service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15333153301133697225/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyMElMWDNnRRAB
